title: Write and run RSpec specs
description: Structure specs with describe/context/it, isolate collaborators with doubles, and run via the project's command.
body: Steps: 1. Place specs under spec/ mirroring the app structure (models, requests, services). 2. Use describe/context to group and it for behavior, with let for lazily-built fixtures. 3. Isolate collaborators with instance_double/spy and stub external calls; avoid hitting real services. 4. For Rails, use request specs for controllers and model specs for validations/associations. 5. Run via bundle exec rspec (or the project's bin/rspec). Rollback point: before changing spec/rails_helper config. Validation: the suite runs green and a deliberately broken expectation fails, proving specs execute rather than being skipped.
